parameters.query: SELECT up.*, g.goal_type, g.target_weight, u.first_name, u.language_code FROM user_profiles up JOIN users u ON up.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN goals g ON up.user_id = g.user_id AND g.is_active = true WHERE up.user_id = $1;
SELECT plan_json FROM meal_plans WHERE user_id = $1 AND is_active = true ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 1;

values.content: Eres un nutriologo experto. Responde EXCLUSIVAMENTE con JSON valido, sin texto adicional.

parameters.query: UPDATE meal_plans SET is_active = false WHERE user_id = $1 AND is_active = true;
INSERT INTO meal_plans (user_id, week_number, year, plan_json, total_calories, is_active, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5, true, NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days') RETURNING id;
